case_title: MCCARTHY, KENNETH J. VS PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCCARTHY, KENNETH J. AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-14-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF RETURNED.NO SUCH ADDRESS.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23314, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, KENNETH J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $59.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,559.00, REPRESENTS SUM CERTAIN OF "ADVANCE FEE". PLAINTIFF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF RE-ADD'L DAMAGES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, KENNETH J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATRICK AND ASSOCIATES, INC. DISMISSING PLTFF'S CLAIM AS PREEMPTED UNDER FEDERAL COPYRIGHT LAW. ENTERED ON 8-31-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
